source_of_truth_assumption: No production source-of-truth ownership is assumed. This project reads a lightweight registry only.
sync_question_for_dashboard_agent: Confirm whether these registry fields are safe as a builder-facing metadata contract, which dashboard or database owns each field, and whether any field should remain summary-only before production sync or dashboard automation is added.

limited_handoff_scope.integration_mode: Add to existing Apps Script repo/project as a separate module.
limited_handoff_scope.client_ui_contract: Server-side code injects window.START_HERE_REPORT before the registry client renderer runs.
safe_defaults: No production writes unless explicitly approved
